help.title: How to Play BetBingo
help.intro:
🎲 *Welcome to BetBingo!*

BetBingo is a lottery game where you pick numbers and win prizes when they match the drawn numbers.
help.how_to_play:
*How to Play:*
1. 💰 Deposit funds into your wallet
2. 🎟️ Buy a ticket for an active game
3. 🔢 You get random numbers assigned
4. 📺 Watch the live draw
5. 🏆 Match 3+ numbers to win!
6. 💸 Withdraw your winnings
help.prizes:
*Prize Tiers:*
Match 3 → 2x your ticket price
Match 4 → 10x your ticket price
Match 5 → 50x your ticket price
Match 6 → JACKPOT! Share of the prize pool
help.faq:
*FAQ:*

*How do I deposit?*
Go to My Wallet > Deposit and pay via Chapa (Telebirr/CBE Birr/Card).

*How are numbers assigned?*
Numbers are randomly assigned when you buy a ticket.

*When are draws?*
Check each game for its scheduled draw time.

*How do I withdraw?*
Go to My Wallet > Withdraw. Minimum withdrawal is 50 ETB.

*Contact Support:*
support@betbingo.com
